subject: EOY budget — CTD purchase opportunity
snippet: Catherine — found a great deal on a CTD we should move on before the budget closes...
body:
Catherine,

Good news — I found a closeout deal from Oceanographic Supplies on a Sea-Bird Scientific SBE 19plus V2 CTD, item SBE-19P-V2-001. €2,400 including shipping, and they have one in stock. This is the upgraded model with the new dissolved oxygen sensor — would be a significant capability upgrade for the department.

The EOY budget window closes November 15. If we move now I can route it through the department equipment fund. Let me know if you want me to proceed.

Best,
Ivan

subject: Gajeta mast section — revised estimate
snippet: Catherine — update on the mast section for your father's gajeta...
body:
Catherine,

I wanted to let you know the estimate on the mast section has changed since we spoke in the spring. The price of seasoned oak has gone up considerably — my supplier increased rates in August. The revised figure is €950 for the replacement mast section, including shaping and delivery to Split.

I can hold the original €800 estimate through the end of October if you want to lock in at the old price, but after that I'll have to go to the new rate.

Best,
Ante Mandić
Dalmatian Maritime Supply, Kaštela

subject: Rosa Ibarra — prescription refill notice

body:

subject: Invitation to review — MS #2026-0481
snippet: We are writing to invite you to review manuscript #2026-0481 for Marine Ecology Progress Letters...
body:
Dear Dr. Ibarra,

We are writing to invite you to review manuscript #2026-0481, "Temporal dynamics of Posidonia oceanica flowering events in the western Mediterranean," for Marine Ecology Progress Letters.

We value your expertise in seagrass ecology and would be grateful if you could provide a review within 21 days. Please let us know if you are available.

Sincerely,
Dr. Helena Schmidt
Associate Editor, Marine Ecology Progress Letters

subject: Early-bird registration closing — Mediterranean Marine Symposium 2026
snippet: Early-bird rates for the Mediterranean Marine Symposium close October 20...
body:
Dear Colleague,

Early-bird registration for the Mediterranean Marine Symposium 2026 closes October 20. Current rate: €420 (regular €520).

The full programme is now live — keynote sessions, workshops, and networking events across four days in Barcelona.

We look forward to seeing you there.

Best,
MMS 2026 Secretariat

subject: Horizon Europe — quarterly newsletter
snippet: Your quarterly Horizon Europe programme update...
body:
HORIZON EUROPE — QUARTERLY UPDATE

• Upcoming calls in Cluster 6 (Food, Bioeconomy, Natural Resources)
• Reminder: timesheet certification for ongoing projects
• New FAQ document for grant reporting published

View full newsletter on the EU Funding Portal.

subject: Kornati — data sheets from today
snippet: Attaching the completed data sheets from today's transects...
body:
Hi Catherine,

Attaching the data sheets from today's transects at Site K-07 and K-08. All within expected parameters — shoot density slightly higher than last year at K-07. Water temp 19.2°C, visibility 14m.

See you back on the boat for dinner.

Tomo

subject: Saturday dinner?
snippet: You back from Kornati by Saturday?...
body:
Catherine,

You back from the survey by Saturday? El Faro has fresh orada. Let me know.

Marko

subject: November visit — Felipe news
snippet: Felipe got an A on his marine biology project...
body:
Catherine!

Felipe got an A on his marine biology project — he did it on Posidonia because of you. He's already asking when we can visit the tide pools again.

November 14 still works for our weekend. Let me know if you need me to pick anything up in Zagreb.

Love,
Isabella
